---
title: "possibly a template"
author: "Matt Tyers"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

# Heading 1

## Heading 2

### Heading 3

#### Heading 4

##### Heading 5

This is a first paragraph.

This is probably normal body text^[And here is a footnote.].

```{r}
# here is some code
```

```{r,  fig.cap="This is a figure caption", echo=FALSE}
plot(1:10)
```

```{r, tab.cap="This is a table caption", echo=FALSE}
knitr::kable(head(mtcars))
```
